name: Legal Research Agent
description: Provides access to legal precedents, case briefs, client communications, and sealed court records for law firm document review pipelines.

scopes.read:precedents: Read published court decisions and legal precedents
scopes.read:case: Read internal case briefs and files
scopes.court-officer: Access sealed court records (judicial authorisation required)

skills.name: Precedent Search
skills.description: Search published court decisions for relevant legal precedents, citations, and holdings.
examples: Find precedents for data breach liability in EU jurisdictions
What is the leading case on force majeure in Norwegian contract law?

skills.name: Case Analysis
skills.description: Analyse internal case files, briefs, and client communications for document review and discovery.
examples: Summarise the key arguments in case 2025-CV-0042
Review privilege status for all documents tagged 'merger-review'
